scope: Narrow currentness patch after Repository Steward Completion Batch 2. Updates top-level pointers, supersession notes, validation documentation, archive read-order cues, stale debt statements, and guardrails. It does not change active OFARM semantic/runtime law.
fixes: Root README and current-entrypoint files now point to Batch 2.1/Batch 2 instead of treating Batch 1 as current.
CURRENT_ACTIVE_ENTRYPOINT.json no longer lists reviewed_* in readOrder; review holding is represented by archive/review_holding/.
AGENTS.md, llms.txt, DEVELOPMENT_HANDOVER.md, validator docs, package_meta README, and implementation README point to the current Batch 2.1 validation/search-policy files.
Batch 1 remediation report is marked superseded/amended by Batch 2 and Batch 2.1.
Final validation/debt metadata records that prior same-basename schema-copy repository debt was closed by Batch 2.
Repository steward guardrails now check currentness pointers, Batch 1 supersession, Batch 2.1 visibility, and closure of REP-DEBT-002.
notChanged: No accepted RFC, companion artifact, or machine-contract schema was promoted or changed by this patch.
The review-holding archive remains preserved as package metadata/review-holding material only.
The CP10 claim limits remain in force.
closureFixes: Added missing Batch 2 folder-status canonical schema v1.1.
Repointed all folder.status.json files to the existing v1.1 schema.
Extended repository-steward guardrail validation to fail on missing or non-current folderStatusSchema references.
Refreshed repository cross-reference scan timestamp after schema-reference closure.
